title: RBI – Bank's Medical Consultant – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC). Candidates with MBBS Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 16-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through RBI official website rbi.org.in.

basic_details.job_title: RBI Bank's Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC). Candidates with MBBS Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 16-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through RBI official website rbi.org.in.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree from any university recognized by the Medical Council of India in the allopathic system of medicine, Post graduate degree in General Medicine, Minimum of two (02) years' experience practicing medicine in any hospital or clinic

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
